rows.description: 1749. Soluta Varia.
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash for more complete description, including '1749.' as visible on the page. gpt-5-mini omitted '1749.' from this header.

rows.description: March 25 to ye Bursar Mrs. Huis Augm. at Xmas last
rows.notes: Amounts agreed by consensus. Description is a merge based on visual verification: corrected date to '25' and 'ye' from gpt-5-mini, 'Huis' and 'Xmas' from gemini-flash, and removed '1749.' from gpt-5-mini's description as it belongs to the header.
rows.english_description: Augmentation payment made to the bursar, Mrs. Huis (Christmas augmentation).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Augmentation payment to the bursar Mrs. Huis, amounting to £50 0s 0d.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment for the price of corn at Padhamas, amounting to £0 1s 0d.

rows.description: to Coach hire & other Expences in going to Bank.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Coach hire and other expenses for going to the bank, amounting to £0 2s 9d.
